code: import React,{useState}from'react';import HomeScreen from'./components/HomeScreen';import BookingScreen from'./components/BookingScreen';import WaitingScreen from'./components/WaitingScreen';import PopupAd from'./components/PopupAd';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs,Fragment as _Fragment}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function App(){const[screen,setScreen]=useState('home');const[departure,setDeparture]=useState('영주역');const[selectedDest,setSelectedDest]=useState(null);const[bookingInfo,setBookingInfo]=useState(null);const[navKey,setNavKey]=useState(0);const[showAd,setShowAd]=useState(true);const navigate=newScreen=>{setNavKey(k=>k+1);setScreen(newScreen);};const goToBooking=dest=>{setSelectedDest(dest);navigate('booking');};const goToWaiting=info=>{setBookingInfo(info);navigate('waiting');};const goHome=()=>{setSelectedDest(null);setBookingInfo(null);navigate('home');};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(_Fragment,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"screen-enter",children:[screen==='home'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(HomeScreen,{departure:departure,setDeparture:setDeparture,onSelectDest:goToBooking}),screen==='booking'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(BookingScreen,{departure:departure,destination:selectedDest,onBack:goHome,onConfirm:goToWaiting}),screen==='waiting'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(WaitingScreen,{bookingInfo:bookingInfo,onBack:goHome})]},navKey),showAd&&screen==='home'&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(PopupAd,{onClose:()=>setShowAd(false)})]});}
